race.comment: Tough. ZENTORNO (3) did enough first up at Bendigo in a bunched finish, getting home well for fifth there after settling back over 1400m. He's much better suited rising in trip and if Egan can settle him closer here he'll be very hard to hold out. OUTDRIVE (4) was first up off a long break at Pakenham but got the job done to break his maiden up on the speed. He should only come on from that and has claims for the double. ANNABELLE SUNSHINE (6) has scored at her last two starts, most recently by 2.5 lengths over 1600m at Moe. Hard to knock and she goes in everything. SQUARE DEAL (5) is going well and is in the mix off a placing here last time out.
